en: I'm not mad, I just want to know.
I did. I broke it. No, no you didn't. Tom?
ko: 아니야. 네가 깨뜨린 게 아니야. 톰?

en: Don't look at me. Look at Ben.
What? I didn't break it. Huh, that's weird. How'd you even know it was broken?
Because it's sitting right in front of us and it's broken.
ko: 우리 바로 앞에 있고, 깨졌잖아. 의심스럽네.

en: Suspicious. No, it's not. If it matters. Probably not, but April was the last one to use it.
ko: 중요하다면. 아마 아닐 거야, 하지만 에이프릴이 마지막으로 사용했어.

en: Liar, I don't even drink that crap. Oh, really? Then what were you doing by the coffee cart earlier?
ko: 거짓말! 나는 그런 걸 안 마셔.

en: I used the wooden stirrers to push back my cuticles. Everyone knows that, Jerry.
ko: 나무 스틱으로 내 큐티클을 밀었어. 모두가 아는 사실이야, 제리.

en: Okay, let's not fight. I broke it. Let me pay for it, Ron.
ko: 알겠어, 싸우지 말자. 내가 깨뜨렸어. 내가 비용을 낼게, 론.

en: Ron, Donna's been awfully quiet. Really? Yeah, really.
Oh my God. I'm trying to read.
I broke it. It burned my hand, so I punched it.
ko: 내가 깨뜨렸어. 손이 타서 주먹으로 쳤어.

en: I predict ten minutes from now they'll be at each other's throats
with war paint on their faces and a pig head on a stick.
ko: 얼굴에 전투 화장을 하고, 막대기에 돼지 머리를 달고.

en: Good. It was getting a little chummy around here.
